# `itsm` — itsm templates

**Industry:** Cross-industry (IT/Ops staff)  ·  **Templates:** 3

Phishing templates impersonating IT Service Management platforms

Phishing-simulation templates for **authorized** security awareness training with [GoPhish](https://getgophish.com/) and [HailBytes SAT](https://hailbytes.com/sat?utm_source=github&utm_medium=folder_readme&utm_campaign=gophish-training-templates). See the [repository README](../README.md) for setup and the [full template catalog](../docs/CATALOG.md) for every category at a glance.

## Templates

| Template | File | Attack vector | Difficulty | Est. click rate |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| ServiceNow Emergency Change Approval | [`servicenow_ticket.html`](servicenow_ticket.html) | credential_harvest | advanced | 20-40% |
| ServiceNow – Access Request Approval | [`servicenow_approval.html`](servicenow_approval.html) | credential_harvest | intermediate | 35-55% |
| Jira Service Management – Ticket Assigned | [`jira_service_desk.html`](jira_service_desk.html) | credential_harvest | beginner | 30-50% |

## Template details

### ServiceNow Emergency Change Approval

- **File:** [`servicenow_ticket.html`](servicenow_ticket.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** advanced · **Est. click rate:** 20-40%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.LastName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.Date}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/itsm_education.html`](education/itsm_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - ServiceNow: Change Request CHG0042891 requires your approval
  - [ITSM] Critical change request — SLA breach imminent
  - Action Required: Emergency production access approval
- **Operator notes:** Best targeted at IT operations, DevOps, and change advisory board members. Advanced difficulty — requires target to be familiar with ITSM workflows. Ticket numbers and grid layout add realism.

### ServiceNow – Access Request Approval

- **File:** [`servicenow_approval.html`](servicenow_approval.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 35-55%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.Date}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/itsm_education.html`](education/itsm_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Approval required: access request RITM0148293
  - A request is waiting for your approval in ServiceNow
  - Action needed: pending approval RITM0148293
- **Operator notes:** Approval-workflow lures exploit routine click-to-approve behavior. Strong for any org running ServiceNow.

### Jira Service Management – Ticket Assigned

- **File:** [`jira_service_desk.html`](jira_service_desk.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** beginner · **Est. click rate:** 30-50%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/itsm_education.html`](education/itsm_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - [JSM] A ticket has been assigned to you
  - You are now the assignee on SD-4471
  - Action needed: new ticket assigned to you
- **Operator notes:** Assigned-ticket notifications are everyday noise in IT teams, which makes this low-suspicion and effective.

## How to use

1. In GoPhish, go to **Email Templates → New Template** and paste the HTML from the file above. Set a subject line from the suggestions.
2. Create a **Landing Page** (see [`../landing-pages/`](../landing-pages/)) to capture the click, and — where a training page is listed — redirect clickers to it so they get immediate education.
3. Configure a realistic **Sending Profile** and launch to a consented, in-scope group. Schedule during business hours for realism.

> **Before sending:** customize sender names, domains, logos, and any brand impersonations to match your engagement and your authorization scope. These templates are for authorized training only.
